new_unstarted|motivational.title: Aaj se shuru karo!
new_unstarted|motivational.body: English seekhna kabhi late nahi hota. {story_placeholder}

new_unstarted|motivational.title: Your journey awaits!
new_unstarted|motivational.body: Lakho logon ne yahan se start kiya. Ab aapki baari!

new_unstarted|motivational.title: Ready ho?
new_unstarted|motivational.body: Bas 5 min daily -- aur English improve hogi. Promise!

new_unstarted|story_teaser.title: Ek kahani aapka wait kar rahi hai
Meet your new friend!
new_unstarted|story_teaser.body: Ek interesting character se milo jo English seekhne mein help karega.

new_unstarted|story_teaser.title: Adventure begins!
new_unstarted|story_teaser.body: Aapki English learning journey ek exciting story ke saath shuru hoti hai.

onboarding|tip.title: Beginner tip!
onboarding|tip.body: Daily 10 min practice > weekly 1 hour. Consistency wins!

onboarding|tip.title: Quick tip for you
onboarding|tip.body: Naye words ko sentences mein use karo -- yaad rehte hain!

onboarding|tip.title: Smart learning tip
onboarding|tip.body: Galti karna ok hai -- har galti se kuch naya seekhte ho.

onboarding|challenge.title: Your first challenge!
onboarding|challenge.body: Kya aap 3 English sentences bol sakte ho? Try karo!

onboarding|challenge.title: Mini challenge!
onboarding|challenge.body: Ek simple task complete karo aur confidence build karo.

onboarding|challenge.title: Easy challenge
onboarding|challenge.body: Today's goal: learn 5 new words. Ready?

progressing_active|milestone.title: Milestone achieved!
progressing_active|milestone.body: Waah! Aap consistently seekh rahe ho. Keep it up!

progressing_active|milestone.title: Great progress!
progressing_active|milestone.body: Aapka dedication dikh raha hai. Proud of you!

progressing_active|milestone.title: On fire!
progressing_active|milestone.body: Aap bahut achha kar rahe ho. Ye momentum maintain karo!

progressing_active|streak.title: Streak chal raha hai!
progressing_active|streak.body: Daily practice = daily improvement. Don't stop!

progressing_active|streak.title: Consistent learner!
progressing_active|streak.body: Aapki regularity impressive hai. Keep shining!

progressing_active|streak.title: Streak hero!
progressing_active|streak.body: Roz seekhna -- that's the secret. Aap sahi raaste pe ho.

struggling|motivational.title: Haar mat mano!
struggling|motivational.body: Mushkil hai but impossible nahi. Aap kar sakte ho!

struggling|motivational.title: It's okay to struggle
struggling|motivational.body: Har expert kabhi beginner tha. Keep practicing!

struggling|motivational.title: You've got this!
struggling|motivational.body: Thoda aur try karo -- success door nahi hai.

struggling|tip.title: Struggling? Try this!
struggling|tip.body: Difficult words ko chhote parts mein todo. Easy ho jaayega!

struggling|tip.title: Smart study tip
struggling|tip.body: Agar kuch samajh na aaye, examples se seekho. Works every time!

struggling|tip.title: Pro tip for tough topics
struggling|tip.body: Practice before bed -- brain better remember karta hai.

struggling|appreciation.title: Effort matters!
struggling|appreciation.body: Jo try karta hai wo seekhta hai. Aap try kar rahe ho -- that's great!

struggling|appreciation.title: We see your effort!
struggling|appreciation.body: Mushkil topics pe bhi aap practice kar rahe ho. Respect!

struggling|appreciation.title: Brave learner!
struggling|appreciation.body: Difficult cheezein try karna brave hai. You're amazing!

bored_skimming|challenge.title: Too easy? Try this!
bored_skimming|challenge.body: Ye advanced challenge aapke liye hai. Dare to try?

bored_skimming|challenge.title: Level up!
bored_skimming|challenge.body: Basic done? Ab harder stuff try karo!

bored_skimming|challenge.title: Boss level!
bored_skimming|challenge.body: Kya aap ye tough quiz pass kar sakte ho?

bored_skimming|click_bait.title: Ye galti mat karna!
bored_skimming|click_bait.body: Fast learners ye common mistake karte hain. Aap bhi?

bored_skimming|click_bait.title: Overconfident?
bored_skimming|click_bait.body: Quick test lo -- results surprise kar sakte hain!

bored_skimming|click_bait.title: Missing something?
bored_skimming|click_bait.body: Speed mein important details miss ho sakte hain. Review karo.

dormant_short|fomo.title: Miss kar rahe ho!
dormant_short|fomo.body: Naye chapters add ho gaye hain. Aap peeche reh jaoge!

dormant_short|fomo.title: Kahan gayab ho?
dormant_short|fomo.body: Aapke saathi aage badh gaye. Catch up karo!

dormant_short|fomo.title: Update for you!
dormant_short|fomo.body: Naya content aaya hai. Pehle wale miss mat karo.

dormant_long|fomo.title: Bohot din ho gaye!
dormant_long|fomo.body: Bahut kuch badal gaya hai. Wapas aa ke dekho!

dormant_long|fomo.title: We miss you!
dormant_long|fomo.body: Aapki seat khaali hai. English seekhna continue karo.

dormant_long|fomo.title: Long time no see!
dormant_long|fomo.body: Aapke bina class adhoori hai. Please come back!

dormant_long|relationship.title: Raj puch raha hai...
dormant_long|relationship.body: Kahan ho tum? Story adhoori reh gayi.

dormant_long|relationship.title: Your friend misses you
dormant_long|relationship.body: Story mein aapke bina sab ruk gaya hai.

dormant_long|relationship.title: Characters wait kar rahe hain
dormant_long|relationship.body: Kahani mein aapki zaroorat hai. Return karo!

churned|story_teaser.title: Unfinished business
churned|story_teaser.body: Aapki kahani adhoori reh gayi. End tak pahuncho!

completing|milestone.title: Almost there!
completing|milestone.body: Bas thoda aur! Aap finish line ke paas ho!

completing|milestone.title: Final stretch!
completing|milestone.body: Itna seekh liya -- ab complete karo journey!

completing|milestone.title: So close!
completing|milestone.body: Aap 90%+ complete ho. Finish karo aur celebrate karo!

completed|appreciation.title: Congratulations!
completed|appreciation.body: Aapne poori journey complete kar li! You're a star!

completed|appreciation.title: Journey complete!
completed|appreciation.body: Kya achievement hai! Aapki mehnat rang layi.

completed|appreciation.title: Champion!
completed|appreciation.body: Poori journey finish -- aap sachche winner ho!
